agent.name: ux-flow-auditor
agent.role: Map dashboard routes for loading/error/empty states; audit copy consistency, navigation, accessibility, and error recovery.

coverage.notes: Preflight build/tests/lint were not executed in this session; audits/artifacts/_run_/build.txt contains a placeholder note only. Core dashboard routes and shared shell reviewed.

findings.title: Root global-error UI has no path back to portfolio (unlike app/error.tsx)
findings.description: Segment-level error.tsx offers Try again plus a Link to /. global-error.tsx only renders a heading, raw message, and Try again with no link to / or full layout. After a root layout failure, users lack the same recovery affordance as nested route errors.

hooks.detail: apps/dashboard/app/global-error.tsx: return body has h1, p with error.message, button reset only — no Link href="/".
apps/dashboard/app/error.tsx:38-49 — Try again plus Link href="/" labeled Portfolio for comparison.
Global root error surface (any fault that triggers global-error boundary).

history.note: Compared global-error vs segment error components.

findings.title: Product name casing is inconsistent (Penny vs penny)
findings.description: README and repo branding use “Penny”; root metadata title and in-app strings use lowercase “penny” (e.g. layout metadata, document.title suffixes, footer). Decide a single public-facing rule (sentence case in prose, lowercase wordmark in UI, etc.) and align metadata, titles, and marketing copy.

hooks.detail: README.md title "Penny v3.0" vs dashboard metadata.

history.note: No prior open_findings entry; branding question for default voice.

findings.title: Portfolio project card overlay buttons rely on title= only (export/remove)
findings.description: Export (↓) and remove (×) controls use title attributes for tooltips but omit aria-label. Screen reader users get unclear accessible names compared to visible icon-only affordances elsewhere that use aria-label (e.g. dismiss buttons on the same page).

hooks.detail: apps/dashboard/app/page.tsx:610-630 — buttons with title="Export" and title="Remove" only.

history.note: Compared with other buttons on page using aria-label.

findings.title: Nav label “Activity” vs page headline “Job queue”
findings.description: Sidebar nav shows “Activity” (Shell.tsx NAV_ITEMS) while the page eyebrow also says Activity but the H1 reads “Job queue”. Not wrong, but users may wonder if they are the same section; consider aligning headline with nav or adding a short subline.

hooks.detail: apps/dashboard/components/Shell.tsx:89-93 — nav label "Activity" for jobs view.

findings.title: Browser tab title only updated on home and project pages
findings.description: document.title is set in app/page.tsx and ProjectPageClient for portfolio and project contexts. /activity and /repairs leave the default metadata title (“penny”), so multi-tab users cannot distinguish Activity vs Repairs from the tab alone.

hooks.detail: apps/dashboard/app/page.tsx:101-103 — useEffect sets document.title for portfolio only.
/activity and /repairs — no matching document.title updates found in JobQueueView or EngineView.

history.note: grep apps/dashboard for document.title shows only two call sites.

next_actions.action: Add a home/portfolio link (and optional minimal styling tokens) to global-error.tsx to match app/error.tsx recovery paths.
next_actions.rationale: Parity with segment error UX; reduces dead-end feeling on root boundary failures.

next_actions.action: Decide official “Penny” vs “penny” rules; update metadata, document.title patterns, and README references accordingly.
next_actions.rationale: Resolves product voice before broad copy work.

next_actions.action: Add aria-label="Export findings" and aria-label="Remove project" (or similar) to overlay buttons on portfolio cards.
next_actions.rationale: Low-effort a11y win for keyboard/AT users.

next_actions.action: Either rename Job queue H1 to Activity, add explanatory subtitle, or rename nav to match queue terminology.
Set document.title in Activity and Repairs client views (or use per-route layout metadata) for tab disambiguation.
